name: web3-dev
description: Build web3 applications, scripts, CLIs, bots, and mobile/desktop clients that read blockchain data through the Blockscout PRO API - a single HTTP API spanning 100+ EVM chains.

interface.shortDescription: Build web3 apps with the Blockscout PRO API.
interface.longDescription: Build web3 applications, scripts, CLIs, bots, and mobile/desktop clients that read blockchain data through the Blockscout PRO API - a single HTTP API spanning 100+ EVM chains.
